acceptanceCriteria: Given no cart exists, when the customer creates a cart with currency code EUR, then a cart is returned with an assigned id and currency code EUR
Given no cart exists, when the customer creates a cart without a currency code, then the command is rejected with a required-field error on currency_code
Given no cart exists, when the customer creates a cart with inline billing and shipping addresses, then the cart is returned with both addresses attached
Given no cart exists, when the customer creates a cart with an inline line item having title, quantity and unit price, then the cart is returned with that line item in its items collection
Given a cart exists, when the customer updates the cart's email, then the cart is returned with the new email
Given a cart exists, when the customer updates the cart via a matching selector, then the cart is updated
Given no cart with the given id exists, when the customer updates that id, then the command is rejected with a not-found error
Given a cart exists, when the customer sets a shipping address on the cart, then the cart reflects the new shipping address
Given an address is attached to a cart, when the customer replaces it with a new full address, then the cart's shipping address is replaced wholesale
Given a cart exists, when the customer sets a billing address on the cart, then the cart reflects the new billing address
Given a cart has a billing address, when the customer provides a full replacement address, then the previous billing address is replaced wholesale
Given a cart exists, when the customer adds a line item with title, quantity 1 and unit price 100, then the cart contains exactly one line item with those values
Given a cart exists, when the customer adds several line items in one call, then all items are present on the cart
Given a cart id that does not exist, when the customer adds a line item, then the command is rejected with a not-found error
Given a cart exists, when the customer adds a line item missing quantity, then the command is rejected with a required-field error on quantity
Given a line item exists, when the customer updates its title via id, then the new title is returned
Given a line item exists, when the customer updates its title via a cart id selector, then the matching line item's title is updated
Given several line items exist across carts, when the customer updates via multiple selectors in one call, then every matching line item is updated
Given a line item exists on a cart, when the customer removes it, then the cart's items collection is empty
Given multiple line items exist on a cart, when the customer removes them all, then the cart's items collection is empty
Given a cart has line items, when the automation sets tax lines per item with code and rate, then those tax lines are present
Given a cart has a line item tax line, when the automation sets a different tax line for the same item, then only the new one remains
Given a cart has line item tax lines, when the automation sets them to an empty list, then all are removed

Given a cart has two tax lines on one item, when the automation sets a list with one updated existing id and one new tax line, then the updated line is updated, the new line is created, and the omitted line is removed
Given a cart has line items, when the automation sets adjustments for each line item, then those adjustments are present
Given a cart already has a line item adjustment, when the automation sets a different adjustment for the same line item, then only the new adjustment remains
Given a cart has line item adjustments, when the automation sets them to an empty list, then all adjustments on all line items are removed
Given a cart has a line item adjustment with id A, when the automation sets adjustments containing id A with changed fields, then the adjustment with id A is updated in place
Given a cart exists, when the customer adds a shipping method with name and amount 100, then the method appears on the cart
Given a cart exists, when the customer adds a shipping method with a negative amount, then the command is rejected due to a check-constraint violation
Given two carts exist, when the customer adds a shipping method to each in one call, then each cart receives its method
Given a cart has shipping methods, when the automation sets tax lines per method, then those tax lines are present
Given a cart has a shipping tax line, when the automation sets a different tax line for the same method, then only the new one remains
Given a cart has shipping tax lines, when the automation sets them to empty, then all are removed

Given a cart has two shipping tax lines on one method, when the automation sets a list with one updated existing id and one new line, then the updated line is updated, the new line is created, and the omitted line is removed
Given a cart has shipping methods, when the automation sets adjustments for each shipping method, then those adjustments are present
Given a cart has a shipping method adjustment, when the automation sets a different adjustment for the same shipping method, then only the new one remains
Given a cart has shipping method adjustments, when the automation sets them to empty, then all are removed

Given a shipping method belongs to cart A, when the automation tries to add an adjustment for that method against cart B, then the command is rejected because the shipping method does not belong to cart B
Given a cart has a shipping method, when the customer removes it, then the cart has no shipping methods
Given a cart has multiple shipping methods, when the customer removes them all, then the cart has no shipping methods
Given a cart exists, when the automation adds a credit line with a positive amount referencing a refund, then the credit line appears on the cart
Given a cart exists, when the automation adds multiple credit lines in one call, then all credit lines are attached to the cart
Given a cart has a credit line, when the automation removes it, then the cart no longer lists that credit line
Given a cart has multiple credit lines, when the automation removes them, then they are soft-deleted from the cart
Given a cart exists, when the customer deletes it, then it is no longer listed for that id
Given a cart has line items and shipping methods, when the customer deletes the cart, then the deletion cascades as a soft-delete to items, shipping methods, and addresses
Given a cart was soft-deleted, when the admin restores it, then the cart is available again with its previously soft-deleted children
Given a non-existent cart id, when the admin restores it, then the command is rejected with a not-found error

Cart.description: Aggregate root representing a shopping cart owned by a customer or anonymous user, priced in a single currency, scoped to a region and sales channel. Holds items, shipping methods, addresses and credit lines until it is either abandoned or converted to an order.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier of the cart.

fields.name: currencyCode
fields.description: ISO-4217 currency code fixed at cart creation and normalised to lower-case.

fields.name: regionId
fields.description: External reference to the Region aggregate the cart is scoped to.

fields.name: customerId
fields.description: External reference to the Customer aggregate owning the cart (null for anonymous).

fields.name: salesChannelId
fields.description: External reference to the Sales Channel aggregate through which the cart was created.

fields.name: email
fields.description: Email address of the buyer associated with the cart.

fields.name: locale
fields.description: BCP-47 language tag used for locale-sensitive display.

fields.name: metadata
fields.description: Free-form integration data attached to the cart.

fields.name: completedAt
fields.description: Marker timestamp set when the cart is converted to an order by an external workflow.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: Timestamp when the cart was created.

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.description: Timestamp when the cart was last updated.

fields.name: deletedAt
fields.description: Timestamp when the cart was soft-deleted, or null if active.

fields.name: billingAddress
fields.description: Billing address attached to the cart, replaced wholesale.

fields.name: shippingAddress
fields.description: Shipping address attached to the cart, replaced wholesale.

fields.name: lineItems
fields.description: Purchasable items added to the cart.

fields.name: shippingMethods
fields.description: Shipping methods selected for the cart.

fields.name: creditLines
fields.description: Monetary credits (refunds, gift cards, store credit) applied to the cart.

LineItem.description: Related entity representing a purchasable item added to the cart with a snapshot of product/variant attributes taken at add-time so later catalogue changes do not mutate the cart.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier of the line item.

fields.name: title
fields.description: Display title of the line item.

fields.name: quantity
fields.description: Number of units of this item in the cart; must be greater than zero.

fields.name: unitPrice
fields.description: Price per unit at the moment the item was added or updated.

fields.name: subtitle
fields.description: Optional secondary display line for the item.

fields.name: thumbnail
fields.description: URL of a thumbnail image representing the item.

fields.name: variantId
fields.description: Snapshot reference to the Product variant in the external Product aggregate.

fields.name: productId
fields.description: Snapshot reference to the Product in the external Product aggregate.

fields.name: productTitle
fields.description: Snapshot of the product title at add-time.

fields.name: productDescription
fields.description: Snapshot of the product description at add-time.

fields.name: productSubtitle
fields.description: Snapshot of the product subtitle at add-time.

fields.name: productType
fields.description: Snapshot of the product type label at add-time.

fields.name: productTypeId
fields.description: Snapshot reference to the product type in the external Product aggregate.

fields.name: productCollection
fields.description: Snapshot of the product collection at add-time.

fields.name: productHandle
fields.description: Snapshot of the product URL handle at add-time.

fields.name: variantSku
fields.description: Snapshot of the variant SKU at add-time.

fields.name: variantBarcode
fields.description: Snapshot of the variant barcode at add-time.

fields.name: variantTitle
fields.description: Snapshot of the variant title at add-time.

fields.name: variantOptionValues
fields.description: Snapshot of the variant option values at add-time.

fields.name: requiresShipping
fields.description: Whether shipping applies to this line item.

fields.name: isDiscountable
fields.description: Whether the line item is eligible for promotions.

fields.name: isGiftcard
fields.description: Whether the line item represents a gift card.

fields.name: isTaxInclusive
fields.description: Whether unit price already includes tax.

fields.name: isCustomPrice
fields.description: Whether the price was set manually instead of from catalogue.

fields.name: compareAtUnitPrice
fields.description: Original list price for strike-through display.

fields.name: metadata
fields.description: Free-form integration data attached to the line item.

fields.name: adjustments
fields.description: Discount adjustments applied to the line item, set-replaced as a collection.

fields.name: taxLines
fields.description: Tax charges applied to the line item, set-replaced as a collection.

ShippingMethod.description: Related entity representing a shipping option selected for the cart with its own amount, tax lines and adjustments. Has independent add/remove lifecycle commands.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier of the shipping method.

fields.name: name
fields.description: Display name of the shipping method.

fields.name: amount
fields.description: Shipping cost amount; must be greater than or equal to zero.

fields.name: description
fields.description: Provider-specific descriptive payload for the method.

fields.name: shippingOptionId
fields.description: External reference to the Fulfillment shipping option aggregate.

fields.name: data
fields.description: Provider-specific metadata such as carrier payload.

fields.name: isTaxInclusive
fields.description: Whether the amount already includes tax.

fields.name: metadata
fields.description: Free-form integration data attached to the shipping method.

fields.name: adjustments
fields.description: Discount adjustments applied to the shipping method, set-replaced as a collection.

fields.name: taxLines
fields.description: Tax charges applied to the shipping method, set-replaced as a collection.

CreditLine.description: Related entity representing a monetary credit applied to the cart such as a refund or redeemed store credit. Has its own add/soft-delete lifecycle and references an external source.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier of the credit line.

fields.name: amount
fields.description: Signed monetary amount; positive credits the cart, negative acts as a surcharge.

fields.name: reference
fields.description: Name of the referenced external aggregate, e.g. refund or gift_card.

fields.name: referenceId
fields.description: Identifier within the referenced external aggregate.

fields.name: metadata
fields.description: Free-form integration data attached to the credit line.

Address.description: Value object describing a postal/contact address attached to a cart for billing or shipping. Immutable and replaced wholesale when updated.

fields.name: firstName
fields.description: First name of the addressee.

fields.name: lastName
fields.description: Last name of the addressee.

fields.name: company
fields.description: Company name associated with the address, if any.

fields.name: address1
fields.description: Primary street address line.

fields.name: address2
fields.description: Secondary address line such as apartment or suite.

fields.name: city
fields.description: City or locality of the address.

fields.name: province
fields.description: State, province, or region of the address.

fields.name: postalCode
fields.description: Postal or ZIP code of the address.

fields.name: countryCode
fields.description: ISO-3166 alpha-2 country code of the address.

fields.name: phone
fields.description: Contact phone number for the address.

fields.name: customerId
fields.description: External reference to the Customer aggregate this address belongs to.

fields.name: metadata
fields.description: Free-form integration data attached to the address.

LineItemAdjustment.description: Value object representing a discount applied to a single line item from a promotion or manual override. Always replaced as part of a collection, never patched individually.

fields.name: amount
fields.description: Monetary amount of the discount; must be greater than or equal to zero.

fields.name: code
fields.description: Promotion code or label identifying the discount source.

fields.name: description
fields.description: Human-readable description of the adjustment.

fields.name: promotionId
fields.description: External reference to the Promotion aggregate that produced this adjustment.

fields.name: providerId
fields.description: Identifier of the system or provider that computed the adjustment.

fields.name: isTaxInclusive
fields.description: Whether the adjustment amount already includes tax.

fields.name: metadata
fields.description: Free-form integration data attached to the adjustment.

LineItemTaxLine.description: Value object representing a tax charge applied to a line item. Replaced as part of a collection rather than updated in place.

fields.name: code
fields.description: Tax code identifying the jurisdiction or category.

fields.name: rate
fields.description: Tax rate expressed as a percentage (e.g. 20 for 20%).

fields.name: description
fields.description: Human-readable description of the tax line.

fields.name: providerId
fields.description: Identifier of the tax provider that computed the line.

fields.name: taxRateId
fields.description: External reference to the Tax aggregate's rate definition.

fields.name: metadata
fields.description: Free-form integration data attached to the tax line.

ShippingMethodAdjustment.description: Value object representing a discount applied to a shipping method. Replaced as part of a collection, not patched individually.

fields.name: amount
fields.description: Monetary amount of the discount; must be greater than or equal to zero.

fields.name: code
fields.description: Promotion code or label identifying the discount source.

fields.name: description
fields.description: Human-readable description of the adjustment.

fields.name: promotionId
fields.description: External reference to the Promotion aggregate that produced this adjustment.

fields.name: providerId
fields.description: Identifier of the system or provider that computed the adjustment.

fields.name: metadata
fields.description: Free-form integration data attached to the adjustment.

ShippingMethodTaxLine.description: Value object representing a tax charge applied to a shipping method. Replaced as part of a collection rather than updated in place.

fields.name: code
fields.description: Tax code identifying the jurisdiction or category.

fields.name: rate
fields.description: Tax rate expressed as a percentage (e.g. 20 for 20%).

fields.name: description
fields.description: Human-readable description of the tax line.

fields.name: providerId
fields.description: Identifier of the tax provider that computed the line.

fields.name: taxRateId
fields.description: External reference to the Tax aggregate's rate definition.

fields.name: metadata
fields.description: Free-form integration data attached to the tax line.
